280.reason: [This 'continue' causes the loop to skip processing the second '&', leading to incorrect tokenization of '&&'. The ptr is not advanced and the second '&' will be processed as a separate token.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [This 'continue' causes the loop to skip processing the second '&', leading to incorrect tokenization of '&&'. The ptr is not advanced and the second '&' will be processed as a separate token.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [After appending '&', the code continues the loop but does not consume the second '&' or advance ptr correctly, leading to incorrect tokenization of "&&"]

294.reason: [This 'continue' causes the loop to skip processing the second '|', leading to incorrect tokenization of '||'. The ptr is not advanced and the second '|' will be processed as a separate token.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [This 'continue' causes the loop to skip processing the second '|', leading to incorrect tokenization of '||'. The ptr is not advanced and the second '|' will be processed as a separate token.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue as with '&': after seeing first '|', it appends and continues without consuming the second '|', causing incorrect handling of "||"]
